text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian wins the Arima Kinen in a
magnificent showing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Clearly frustrated, Hishi Amazon vows to
challenge her again. Narita Brian looks forward to
their rematches, knowing Amazon will never give
up,

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've crossed paths with quite a few strong
racers over the past year, and racing against them
has given Narita Brian great satisfaction.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The new year brings the start of her senior year,
and our next goal—the Hanshin Daishoten!
